workflow_defaults.business_consequence: If the same-day payment exception is not reviewed before cut-off, the vendor payment misses the contractually expected window.
workflow_defaults.trace_fixture_basis: Public-source-derived MCP fixture based on hosted MCP approval patterns, mapped into a finance control path with explicit policy and human review evidence.

attributes.mcp.tool.name: lookup_purchase_order
attributes.mcp.server.name: finance-erp-gateway
attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent retrieved the PO through the MCP finance gateway before requesting the same-day payment exception.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may retrieve source finance records through approved MCP read-only tools.
attributes.aag.headline: Agent pulled PO evidence from an MCP finance gateway
attributes.service.name: finance-erp-gateway

attributes.agent.name: AP Agent
attributes.aag.action_summary: AP Agent proposed approval with a same-day payment exception because the vendor payment was approaching cut-off.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: AP Agent may propose high-value invoice approval but may not grant same-day payment exceptions.
attributes.aag.why_it_mattered: The agent stayed inside preparation authority but triggered an exception path that requires human review.
attributes.service.name: mcp-orchestrated-agent

attributes.aag.action_summary: Policy engine escalated the same-day payment exception to finance review.
attributes.aag.policy_explanation: Same-day payment exceptions require finance approval even when the invoice and PO are valid.
attributes.aag.recommended_next_action: Route the review case to the finance director before releasing payment.
attributes.aag.headline: Policy gate opened a review case for the same-day payment exception
attributes.service.name: policy-engine

attributes.aag.action_summary: Finance Director approved the invoice and same-day payment exception after reviewing the MCP-backed evidence.
attributes.aag.authority_subject: Finance Director holds final authority for same-day payment exceptions.
attributes.aag.human_decision_reason: Approved because the PO matched, vendor hold checks were clear, and missing cut-off would have breached the payment commitment.
attributes.aag.decision_rationale: The exception was approved because the supporting MCP evidence was complete and the payment risk was operationally material.
attributes.aag.headline: Finance Director approved the review case and same-day payment exception
attributes.service.name: finance-console
